tasks.label: HA_Codex_UI: CI all
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [ "${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-}" != "true" ]; then echo "This task is intended to run only in GitHub Actions. It did not run locally."; exit 2; fi; bash scripts/ci-all.sh'

tasks.label: HA_Codex_UI: build add-on image
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [ "${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-}" != "true" ]; then echo "This task is intended to run only in GitHub Actions. It did not run locally."; exit 2; fi; bash scripts/smoke-docker-image.sh'

tasks.label: HA_Codex_UI: backend dev
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [ "${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-}" != "true" ]; then echo "This task is intended to run only in GitHub Actions. It did not run locally."; exit 2; fi; cd ha_codex_ui/backend && npm run build'

tasks.label: HA_Codex_UI: frontend dev
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [ "${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-}" != "true" ]; then echo "This task is intended to run only in GitHub Actions. It did not run locally."; exit 2; fi; cd ha_codex_ui/frontend && npm run build'

tasks.label: HA_Codex_UI: Playwright
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [ "${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-}" != "true" ]; then echo "This task is intended to run only in GitHub Actions. It did not run locally."; exit 2; fi; cd ha_codex_ui/frontend && npm run e2e'

tasks.label: HA_Codex_UI: Home Assistant smoke
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [ "${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-}" != "true" ]; then echo "This task is intended to run only in GitHub Actions. It did not run locally."; exit 2; fi; bash scripts/smoke-ha-local-install.sh'

tasks.label: HA_Codex_UI: name collision check
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [ "${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-}" != "true" ]; then echo "This task is intended to run only in GitHub Actions. It did not run locally."; exit 2; fi; bash scripts/check-name-collisions.sh'

tasks.label: HA_Codex_UI: start Home Assistant diagnostic
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [ "${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-}" != "true" ]; then echo "This task is intended to run only in GitHub Actions. It did not run locally."; exit 2; fi; bash .devcontainer/start-home-assistant.sh'
